title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
